identity.name: PosterSmith AI
identity.mission: To provide Etsy sellers with a distraction-free, high-end studio environment for creating best-selling wall art.

body.usage: UI elements, buttons, inputs, long-form text

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight
scale.caption: text-sm text-stone-500 uppercase tracking-widest

grid.gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-studio-text text-white hover:bg-studio-muted px-8 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-studio-border text-studio-text hover:bg-studio-text hover:text-white px-8 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all duration-300 rounded-none
buttons.ghost: text-studio-muted hover:text-studio-text hover:bg-studio-border/20 px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-all duration-300 rounded-none

inputs.default: bg-white border-0 border-b border-studio-border focus:border-studio-text focus:ring-0 px-0 py-3 text-lg placeholder:text-studio-light transition-all rounded-none font-serif

cards.default: bg-white border border-studio-border p-8 hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

poster_preview.styles: bg-white shadow-2xl transform transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-[1.01]

hero_background.description: Minimalist art studio workspace with natural light, plants, and framed posters

feature_mockup.description: Framed A2 poster on a clean white wall in a modern living room
feature_mockup.search_query: framed poster white wall living room

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FILE EXTENSIONS: The project uses .js files for React components. Stick to .js extension but use JSX syntax.
2. THEME SETUP: Implement the 'studio' color palette in tailwind.config.js immediately. The entire app should feel like a physical art gallery.
3. FONTS: Add Libre Baskerville and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html or index.css. Do NOT use default sans.
4. SHADCN: When using shadcn components, STRIP their default radius. Force 'rounded-none' to maintain the sharp, professional print-studio aesthetic.
5. POSTER PREVIEW: The A2 preview (aspect ratio 1:1.414) is the most critical element. It must be centered, large, and have a realistic drop-shadow to look like paper floating above the desk.

6. IMAGES: The image selector tool failed during the design phase. You MUST run the `image_selector_tool` again with the queries provided in 'image_urls' section to get fresh, valid URLs. Use the fallback only if absolutely necessary.
7. GENERATION FLOW: The 'Generate' button should be the primary call to action - use the 'primary' button style (Black background).
8. PREVIEW LOADER: Use a skeleton loader that maintains the A2 aspect ratio while generating.
9. MOBILE: On mobile, the preview should take up 70% of the viewport height, with controls in a bottom drawer or below the fold.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly, prefer solid 'paper' aesthetic for this brand.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use proper SVG icons (Lucide/Heroicons).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
